properties.displayName: Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled

status.description: Secure transfer is not enforced on this storage account.

metadata.description: Secure transfer is an option that forces the storage account to accept requests only from secure connections (HTTPS).
metadata.remediationDescription: To enable secure transfer required: 1. Open the storage account. 2. Under Settings, set 'Secure transfer required' to Enabled.
